title: Context Report Envelope
description: Shared frontmatter envelope for context reports produced and consumed by skills. Individual skills may add skill-specific fields; this schema defines the canonical shared fields.

version.description: Version of the producing skill. Should follow semantic versioning when a version is declared.

key.description: Report identifier, usually matching the ticket, session, or feature key the report is about.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the report was generated.

summary.description: One-sentence synthesis of the report's content.

artifacts.description: List of related report or artifact paths.

ticket.description: Ticket key the report is about (used by debrief and ticket-research).

scope.description: Scope identifier, e.g., feature, route, bug, module (used by baseline).

branch.description: Branch the report was produced on (used by debrief and baseline).

commit.description: Commit hash the report was produced at (used by debrief and baseline).

method.description: Capture method, e.g., ui-browser, api-http, test-runner, code-snapshot, manual (used by baseline).

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update (used by debrief).

baselined_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the baseline was captured (used by baseline).

parent.description: Parent ticket key, if any (used by debrief).

parent_debrief.description: Path to the parent debrief report (used by debrief).
